MOS.sentence: Mosaic is having a quiet day with a small uptick, sitting near its yearly lows despite fertilizer demand holding steady.

ASML.sentence: ASML jumped over 3% today, which isn't surprising given they're the only company that makes the ultra-advanced machines needed to print the newest computer chips.

LIN.sentence: Linde barely moved today — industrial gas demand is steady as always, though their profit margins aren't quite as fat as they've been historically.

MSFT.sentence: Microsoft dipped slightly despite Azure cloud revenue growing 33% as AI demand keeps accelerating.

ENB.sentence: Enbridge is down a bit today — the pipeline business is steady but their dividend yield is getting close to levels where it starts looking expensive.

ETHA.sentence: Ethereum dropped and is now sitting about 28% below its recent highs, which after a big crypto run-up earlier this year isn't shocking.

GLNCY.sentence: Glencore fell over 1% and is oddly underperforming other copper miners even though copper prices have been strong lately.

IBIT.sentence: Bitcoin was essentially flat today, trading about 15% below its recent highs after the big rally earlier this year.

KOF.sentence: Coca-Cola FEMSA had a good day, up nearly 2% as the Mexican peso has been holding steady against the dollar.

PBR.A.sentence: Petrobras was unchanged today — their dividend yield is decent at about 7% but not nearly as juicy as the 10-15% they typically pay when oil prices are really cooking.

AMKBY.sentence: Maersk got hammered today, dropping over 8%, but their ships are now trading for less than it would cost to build new ones, which historically has been a good buying opportunity.

SPY.sentence: The broad US stock market was up slightly today but is looking a bit stretched after the recent run-up.
